ddls:
CREATE TABLE "audio_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio signal */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio signal */,
  "format" INTEGER /* ID of the format (e.g., WAV, MP3) */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* ID of the sample rate (e.g., 44.1 kHz, 48 kHz) */,
  "bit_depth" INTEGER /* ID of the bit depth (e.g., 16-bit, 24-bit) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the audio signal in seconds */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the audio file in bytes */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the audio signal */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the audio signal was uploaded */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the audio signal was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the audio signal (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_signals_sample_rate FOREIGN KEY ("sample_rate") REFERENCES sample_rates ("sample_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_signals_bit_depth FOREIGN KEY ("bit_depth") REFERENCES bit_depths ("bit_depth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_signals_format FOREIGN KEY ("format") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the format (e.g., WAV, MP3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension associated with the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_rates" (
  "sample_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample rate */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate (e.g., 44.1 kHz, 48 kHz) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample rate */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Indicates if the sample rate is a standard rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bit_depths" (
  "bit_depth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bit depth */,
  "bit_depth" INTEGER /* Bit depth (e.g., 16-bit, 24-bit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bit depth */,
  "dynamic_range" INTEGER /* Dynamic range associated with the bit depth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bit_depth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., audio engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio signal being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the signal */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the signal */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the signal */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES audio_signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio signal being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threading) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_comments_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES audio_signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio signal being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the signal (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_ratings_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES audio_signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the audio signal being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., music, speech) */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_tags_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES audio_signals ("signal_id")
)
